focus: CIAP D4 formally promoted (9th D4 SI, 0.88). Linear ceiling cluster complete. RCBC introduced as D3 candidate SI #47.

SI45_CIAP.ontological_types: theoretical (DC#1 game theory), designed empirical (DC#2 adversarial ML), emergent competitive (DC#3 economic markets)
SI45_CIAP.note: Highest-confidence D4 theorem. Meta-theorem: ceiling_TCA and ceiling_GCRSC are CIAP corollaries.

SI47_RCBC.description: RAAI × CIAP conjunction: researchers optimizing training pipelines against fixed benchmarks face CIAP-fails (Goodhart at meta level), while RAAI ensures trained models cannot introspectively detect benchmark-CA divergence. Double-layer CA-degradation predicts benchmark score inflation while CA stagnates/degrades.
SI47_RCBC.first_dc_candidate: AI benchmark saturation literature (MMLU saturation dynamics, fixed vs. novel benchmark gaps)

key_insight_c75: CIAP D4 promotion closes the linear ceiling cluster: all three ceiling theorems (ceiling_TCA, ceiling_GCRSC, CIAP) are now D4-graded. CIAP's near-tautological algebraic status explains its highest-confidence position (0.88) — given CIA_i independence (the definition of CIAP-holds), the linear ceiling is mathematical necessity. The RAAI×CIAP conjunction generates RCBC: a structural prediction that benchmark score inflation is necessary when researchers optimize against fixed benchmarks (CIAP-fails) and models trained in this regime adopt OA-calibration from the benchmark-optimized signal (RAAI). This is a double-layer CA-degradation with potentially significant empirical testability.

passive_accumulation.RAAI_ZR: D4 confirmed — ZR now D4-maintenance mode
passive_accumulation.CIAP_ZR: D4 confirmed — ZR now D4-maintenance mode
